CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-10-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610) After hearing order, off calendar, dismissal on file.

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-10-2013 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jun-04-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Appearance by Linda Ross, Esq. for Plaintiff. Matter reported settled. An Order to Show Cause pursuant to CRC 3.1385 is set to JUN-04-2013 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-02-2013 Continued To Apr-09-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-17-2012 Continued To Jan-08-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Reclaaify Litigation To Limited Jurisdiction; Memo Of P & A; Dec And Pos
Off Calendar Aug-22-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Kevin Gilbert, Esq. of Meyers Nave, Tel. 510.808.2000, for Defendant and moving party;
Linda Ross, Esq. of L/O of Linda Ross, Tel. 415.563.2400, for Plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT'S Motion To Reclassify Litigation To Limited Jurisdiction is Denied. Defendant has provided insufficient evidence that a verdict over $25,000 is virtually unobtainable. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976
